name: Reblica
short_description: Reblica is a cyberpunk-style action platformer shooting game. In Ark, a city full of chaos and crime, become the mercenary Bianna, defeat various enemies and complete quests.
detailed_description:
Take to the streets as mercenary Bianna in the cyberpunk-inspired city of Ark. Move forward and face the city's dark realities with the help of your best friend Rodante.

Game Features:

-You can perform 7 attacks with a total of 7 types of guns!

-You can perform various actions such as double jumping, wall climbing, and rolling!

-A total of 6 unique stages are prepared, excluding the tutorial!

-Over 40 types of enemies attack you in a variety of ways!

-Entrust your ears to addictive synthwave music!

-Watch the witty conversation between the main characters Bianna and Rodante!
